_meta.description: Editorial source-of-truth for the public portfolio page. Hand-maintained by Rex. Merged with Convex structural data at build time.

categories.note_en: Base layer — yield-producing, low beta, recession-resistant
categories.note_zh: 底座层——带息、低 beta、抗衰退

categories.note_en: Diversified defensive layer — bond core + overseas equity tilt
categories.note_zh: 分散防御层——债券核心 + 海外权益倾斜

categories.note_en: Long + swing mix — AI-electricity core with opportunistic overlays
categories.note_zh: 长期 + 波段组合——AI 电力核心 + 机会主义叠加

categories.note_en: Asymmetric bet — long-duration, non-correlated, high-volatility core
categories.note_zh: 不对称下注——长久期、低相关、高波动核心

600089.thesis_en: UHV export boom: overseas orders + margin expansion + electrification tailwind. SOTP undervalued.
600089.thesis_zh: 特高压出海：海外订单 + 毛利扩张 + 电气化顺风。分部估值偏低。

600900.thesis_en: Bond-like utility with AI-era optionality — Yangtze hydro base + potential data-center PPA upside.
600900.thesis_zh: 类债券属性 + AI 时代期权：长江水电基荷 + 潜在数据中心 PPA 增量。

01816.thesis_en: Structural nuclear gap ahead — approvals accelerating, 5-8 year physical build-out, AI demand backstops price.
01816.thesis_zh: 结构性核电空窗——核准加速、5-8 年物理建设周期、AI 需求背书电价。

CEG.thesis_en: Pure-play nuclear with AI data-center PPAs signed. Long-duration cash flow, structural undervaluation vs infra peers.
CEG.thesis_zh: 纯核电 + AI 数据中心 PPA 已签。长久期现金流，相对基建同业结构性低估。

AAPL.thesis_en: Cash flow moat + AI on-device optionality + buyback compound. Hold-forever core.
AAPL.thesis_zh: 现金流护城河 + 端侧 AI 期权 + 回购复利。永远不卖核心。

HOOD.thesis_en: Prediction market + crypto + retail trading flywheel. High-asymmetry swing on regulatory path.
HOOD.thesis_zh: 预测市场 + 加密 + 零售交易飞轮。监管路径高度不对称，波段仓位。

sector_research.title_zh: AI 电力 · 五层蛋糕
sector_research.scope_en: Full-stack AI power map: chips → interconnect → power conversion → data centers → baseload generation
sector_research.scope_zh: AI 电力全栈：芯片 → 互联 → 电源转换 → 数据中心 → 基荷发电
sector_research.key_conclusion_en: Electricity is the physical entry ticket for AI. 2026 data-center capex ~$400B already contracted. Bottleneck = 5-8 year window.
sector_research.key_conclusion_zh: 电力是 AI 时代的物理准入门票。2026 全球数据中心 Capex ~$4000 亿已签合同。瓶颈窗口期 5-8 年。
layers_zh: L3 转换（变压/电力设备）

sector_research.scope_en: CN machinery export play: 三一 / 恒立 / 工程机械 ETF — annual report catalyst + tariff risk
sector_research.scope_zh: 中国装备出海线索：三一 / 恒立 / 工程机械 ETF，年报催化 + 关税风险
sector_research.key_conclusion_en: Backtest shows only RSI<30 + 52w drawdown>20% co-signal has 82% hit rate. Don't pre-position on theme alone.
sector_research.key_conclusion_zh: 回测证明唯一有效的共振信号是 RSI<30 + 52 周回撤>20%（17 次样本 82% 胜率）。别在主题上提前布局。

sector_research.scope_en: CLARITY Act impact: yield-bearing stablecoin legal carve-out + platform risk matrix
sector_research.scope_zh: CLARITY 法案影响：稳定币收益豁免 + 平台风险矩阵
sector_research.key_conclusion_en: Keep USDT/USDC base as yield core, diversify across 2-3 trustworthy venues. Watch for yield erosion post-regulation.
sector_research.key_conclusion_zh: 保持 USDT/USDC 作为收益底座，分散 2-3 个可信平台。关注监管后收益率压缩。

sector_research.scope_en: Beyond ETF: HOOD / AAPL / megacap concentration vs diversified growth basket
sector_research.scope_zh: 跳出 ETF：HOOD / AAPL / 大盘集中 vs 成长分散篮子
sector_research.key_conclusion_en: Swing on prediction-market exposure via HOOD, hold AAPL for compound. Size swing <5% of stocks book.
sector_research.key_conclusion_zh: HOOD 作为预测市场波段，AAPL 长期复利。波段仓位 <5% 股票盘。

deep_research.thesis_en: Bond-like utility with AI-era optionality. Bottom line is three-gorges cash flow, upside is data-center PPA.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 类债券公用事业 + AI 期权。下限是三峡现金流，上限是数据中心 PPA。

deep_research.thesis_en: 20 reactors under construction + approval acceleration. Regulated utility = electricity bond, not AI-tax-base.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 20 台在建 + 核准加速。管制定价 = 电力债，不是 AI 税基。

deep_research.thesis_en: UHV + overseas orders + transformer shortage. SOTP > market cap, not AI-dependent.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 特高压 + 海外订单 + 变压器短缺。分部估值 > 市值，不依赖 AI。

deep_research.thesis_en: Non-regulated nuclear with Microsoft/AWS PPA signed. Long-protocol cash flow, AI-tax-base in the US model.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 非管制核电 + 微软/AWS PPA 已签。长协锁定现金流，美式"电力税基"载体。

deep_research.thesis_en: US largest LNG exporter. PE 11x, FCF +42%, long-term contracts, buyback compound. AI-agnostic.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 美国最大 LNG 出口商。PE 11x、FCF +42%、长协锁定、回购复利。与 AI 无关。

deep_research.thesis_en: 866 named data-center projects. RSI overbought → waiting for R:R ≥ 2.0 on pullback.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 866 个有名有姓的数据中心项目。RSI 超买 → 等待回调后 R:R ≥ 2.0。

deep_research.thesis_en: Grid components with data-center exposure. R:R failed at current price, back on watchlist until <$480.
deep_research.thesis_zh: 电网组件 + 数据中心敞口。当前价 R:R 不达标，回观察池等 <$480。

roundtables.topic_en: AI era — will electricity become the new tax base?
roundtables.topic_zh: AI 时代，电力是否会成为新税基？
roundtables.title_zh: AI 电力 · 六人圆桌

guests.name: 查理·芒格
guests.position_en: Physical facts ≠ good investments — price is the only variable that determines return
guests.position_zh: 物理事实 ≠ 好投资——价格才是决定回报的唯一变量

guests.name: 黄仁勋
guests.position_en: Electricity is the physical entry ticket for AI. 1000W per GB200, $400B data-center capex in 2026
guests.position_zh: 电力是 AI 算力的物理准入门票。单颗 GB200 1000W，2026 Capex $4000 亿

guests.name: 丹尼尔·耶金
guests.position_en: Energy-history pattern: every bottleneck eventually gets routed around. Electricity tax-base is a 5-8 year transitional window
guests.position_zh: 能源史规律：卡脖子的逻辑越成立，被绕过的速度就越快。电力税基是 5-8 年过渡性的

guests.name: 瑞·达利欧
guests.position_en: Logic-right ≠ timing-right. NAAIM 80+, Fed still QT — 58% cash suddenly going all-in on electricity is the danger signal
guests.position_zh: 逻辑对 ≠ 时机对。NAAIM 80+、美联储缩表——58% 现金突然 all in 电力本身就是危险信号

guests.name: 张五常
guests.position_en: Governments tax what's easiest to see. Tokens are easier to measure than electricity — AI tax-base is a bottleneck premium, not a tax
guests.position_zh: 政府收税看"什么最容易被看见"——token 比电表更容易计量。电力是瓶颈溢价，不是税基

guests.name: 段永平
guests.position_en: Three questions only — good business, good management, fair price. LNG / 003816 / MOD all say yes
guests.position_zh: 只问三件事——生意好、管理行、价格便宜。LNG / 003816 / MOD 三个都答"是"

rounds.core_tension_en: Is electricity an 'institutional tax-base' (permanent power node) or a 'cyclical bottleneck premium' (temporary supply-demand gap)?
rounds.core_tension_zh: 电力是"制度性税基"（永久性权力节点）还是"周期性瓶颈溢价"（过渡性供需失衡）？
rounds.fork_en: Tax-base → hold 10yr+, high PE OK, heavy nuclear (003816/CEG). Bottleneck → 5-8yr window, low PE only, cash-flow names (LNG/TLN/MOD)
rounds.fork_zh: 若是税基 → 长持 10 年+、接受高 PE、重仓核电（003816/CEG）；若是瓶颈 → 5-8 年窗口、只买低 PE、重仓现金流（LNG/TLN/MOD）

rounds.core_tension_en: Of 24 candidates, which survive the 'if AI thesis fails' stress test? All-weather: LNG / 003816 / 600900 / WMB / 600089. PE-stretched: PWR / ETN / CCJ
rounds.core_tension_zh: 24 个标的中，哪些能扛过"AI 叙事不成立也值这个价"压力测试？全天候：LNG / 003816 / 600900 / WMB / 600089。PE 偏高：PWR / ETN / CCJ
rounds.fork_en: Zhang: CN regulated electricity is a bond, US non-regulated (TLN/CEG) is the real 'AI tax-right' — can't mix
rounds.fork_zh: 张五常：中国管制电力是债券，美国非监管（TLN/CEG）才是真正"AI 收税权"——不能混配

rounds.core_tension_en: Three-bucket method: defensive base (长电/WMB, bond-like) + core offense (003816/600089, dollar-cost) + opportunistic (LNG/MOD/TLN, wait for signal)
rounds.core_tension_zh: 三桶法：防御底座（长电+WMB 类债券）+ 核心进攻（003816+600089 分月）+ 机会主义（LNG/MOD/TLN 等信号）
rounds.fork_en: Dalio: pace matters more than size. Don't all-in, don't stay all-cash — hedged, staged, event-driven
rounds.fork_zh: 达利欧：节奏比仓位更重要。不要 all-in，也不要 all-cash——对冲、分批、事件驱动

roundtables.final_verdict_en: Full conviction on the AI-electricity basket, but structural: CN hydro/nuclear as bond-like base, US non-regulated nuclear (CEG) as pure-play AI-rev. Don't pay 80x PE for cyclical names. Three-bucket execution.
roundtables.final_verdict_zh: AI 电力整组信念成立，但分层：A 股水电/核电做类债券底座、美股非监管核电（CEG）做纯 AI 收入敞口。别为周期股付 80x PE。三桶法分批。
implications_en: Long 长江电力 (600900) + 中国广核 (01816): bond-like base, hold-forever
Long CEG: US AI-PPA pure-play, high conviction
Long 特变 (600089): UHV + overseas, not AI-dependent
Watch LNG: add on pullback below $230 with R:R ≥ 2
Avoid CCJ (PE 117) and SMR (unprofitable): narrative-driven overpricing
implications_zh: 长江电力 (600900) + 中国广核 (01816) 长期持有：类债券底座
CEG 长期：美式 AI-PPA 纯敞口、高信念
特变 (600089) 长期：特高压 + 海外订单，不依赖 AI
LNG 观察：$230 以下 + R:R ≥ 2 加仓
避开 CCJ（PE 117）和 SMR（亏损）：叙事驱动过度定价

macro_signals_fallback._note: Used by build script when thermometer-history.jsonl is empty.
